input.background: A laboratory kit states that the standard deviation of its results can be expected to vary with σ=1 unit. A lab technician takes four measurements using this kit.
input.question: What is value of the standard deviation of the x̄ of the four measurements taken with this kit?

output.answer: The standard deviation of the mean of four measurements = σ/√n = 1/√4 = 0.5.
